name: agentsmcp-research-bench-demo
description: Multi-agent research bench you can join from Claude Desktop. Shows cold-restart, cross-tool steering, and compression.

scripts.server: ts-node --transpile-only -e "import('agentsmcp').then(async m => { const { app, ready } = m.createServer(process.env.AGENTMAILBOX_DB ?? './bench.db'); await ready; app.listen(Number(process.env.PORT ?? 43500), () => console.log('[server] :' + (process.env.PORT ?? 43500))); })"
